name: cjbs-website-template
description: CODED x Cambridge Judge Business School — workshop website template. Fork, clone, and build your Scrum project on top.

scripts.db:reset: rm -f prisma/dev.db && prisma db push && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.setup: prisma generate && prisma db push && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.postinstall: prisma generate && prisma db push --skip-generate && tsx prisma/seed.ts && node scripts/welcome.mjs
